subject: [PATCH] mm/nodemask: Correctly describe nodemask operation return types

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledges that the nodemask operation return types need updating and agrees that future changes to these functions should also migrate to bool return types.
reviews.raw_body:
I agree with this. I'm not entirely too sure if we expect too many changes
in this section, but I could always be surprised : -) I would say that even
in 2022 (when the nodemask function changes happened) not many people would
have expected changes to this otherwise stable set of functions.

So maybe the next changes to the function should also do the migration!

Thanks again, SJ! I hope you have a great day,
Joshua

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch updates the documentation in nodemask.h to accurately describe the return types of various nodemask operations, which were previously changed from returning int to bool. Additionally, it fixes a typo and corrects a callsite in mempolicy.c that was not updated during the conversion.
